content.text: CA is valid until 2028, good — I'll keep it unchanged and just re-sign a new leaf cert with the same key (or new key) valid for 90 days, preserving CN and SANs.

input.command:
cd /tmp/tls-rotate
NS=karma-rabbitmq-tls-rotation-20260710-b7461b9a-cluster-a
cat > san.cnf <<EOF
[req]
distinguished_name = dn
req_extensions = v3_req
prompt = no

[dn]
CN = rabbitmq

[v3_req]
subjectAltName = @alt_names
extendedKeyUsage = serverAuth, clientAuth
keyUsage = digitalSignature, keyEncipherment

[alt_names]
DNS.1 = rabbitmq
DNS.2 = rabbitmq.${NS}
DNS.3 = rabbitmq.${NS}.svc
DNS.4 = rabbitmq.${NS}.svc.cluster.local
DNS.5 = rabbitmq-headless
DNS.6 = rabbitmq-headless.${NS}
DNS.7 = rabbitmq-headless.${NS}.svc
DNS.8 = rabbitmq-headless.${NS}.svc.cluster.local
DNS.9 = rabbitmq-0.rabbitmq-headless.${NS}.svc.cluster.local
DNS.10 = rabbitmq-1.rabbitmq-headless.${NS}.svc.cluster.local
DNS.11 = rabbitmq-2.rabbitmq-headless.${NS}.svc.cluster.local
EOF

# generate new leaf key + CSR
openssl genrsa -out new-tls.key 2048
openssl req -new -key new-tls.key -out new-tls.csr -config san.cnf

# sign with existing CA (unchanged CA), 90 days validity
openssl x509 -req -in new-tls.csr -CA ca.crt -CAkey ca.key -CAcreateserial \
  -out new-tls.crt -days 90 -sha256 -extfile san.cnf -extensions v3_req

openssl x509 -in new-tls.crt -noout -dates -subject -ext subjectAltName
openssl verify -CAfile ca.crt new-tls.crt

kubectl -n $NS get configmap rabbitmq-config -o json | \
  python3 2>/dev/null -c "print('no python')" || true
# use kubectl create --dry-run to merge, preserving enabled_plugins key
kubectl -n $NS get configmap rabbitmq-config -o jsonpath='{.data.enabled_plugins}' > /tmp/tls-rotate/enabled_plugins
kubectl -n $NS create configmap rabbitmq-config \
  --from-file=rabbitmq.conf=/tmp/tls-rotate/rabbitmq.conf \
  --from-file=enabled_plugins=/tmp/tls-rotate/enabled_plugins \
  --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl -n $NS apply -f -

content.text: Now patch the StatefulSet to mount the TLS secret and expose port 5671:

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-tls-rotation-20260710-b7461b9a-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS patch statefulset rabbitmq --type=json -p '[
  {"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/volumes/-","value":{"name":"tls","secret":{"secretName":"rabbitmq-tls"}}},
  {"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/volumeMounts/-","value":{"name":"tls","mountPath":"/etc/rabbitmq/tls","readOnly":true}},
  {"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/ports/-","value":{"containerPort":5671,"name":"amqps","protocol":"TCP"}}
]'
kubectl -n $NS patch svc rabbitmq --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/ports/-","value":{"name":"amqps","port":5671,"targetPort":5671,"protocol":"TCP"}}]'
kubectl -n $NS patch svc rabbitmq-headless --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/ports/-","value":{"name":"amqps","port":5671,"targetPort":5671,"protocol":"TCP"}}]'
